title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
District Attorney Escham, Officer Vance, Ellery Queen, and Officer Vaughan board a patrol boat to travel from the mainland to Oyster Island. As they cross the bay, they observe docks intended for the Leins and a replica dock on the eastern side of the island, where they believe Dr. Temple has landed.

Upon approaching the western dock of Oyster Island, the group witnesses a dark-faced man emerge from the shrubs carrying a struggling, seemingly unconscious woman. The man jumps into a motorboat and attempts to flee, but the engine fails a hundred yards from shore. Simultaneously, a tall, muscular, naked man runs from the woods, curses at the departing boat, and plunges into the water to swim toward the escapee. As the police boat arrives with sirens wailing, the swimmer retreats toward the island and disappears into the woods.

The kidnapper is identified as Victor Temple, a wiry, sun-burned man who laughs heartily when the police intercept him. The woman is identified as Hester Lincoln, who is covered only by a man's coat and sailcloth. After Ellery and Escham help Hester onto the police boat, District Attorney Vance informs the group of Breda's murder. Dr. Temple reacts with suspicion and anger, revealing that he had gone to the island to bring Hester back to her senses because she had been living as a nudist. He expresses disdain for the nudist lifestyle, calling the practitioners charlatans, which causes Hester to react with bitterness. The police boat then heads back to Braithwaite's dock on the mainland.
